RULING: matter discussed. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF, A CLASS OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement. MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert B. Hancock, Esq. of Pacific Justice Center, Tel. 415.310.1940, for plaintiff, by court call;
Brendan E. Radke, Esq. of Morgan Lewis, Tel. 415.442.1213, for defendant.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF, A CLASS OF ALL OTHER SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement is continued to July 25, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Plaintiff Erika Mccartney, On Behalf Of Herself, A Class Of Others Similarly Situated, And The General Public's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is Granted. No opposition filed.
